title: subagent: BACKGROUND_AGENTS HashMap never removes finished agents — unbounded growth over session
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Performance and Complexity / Memory. Location: src/subagent.rs:234-322 (BackgroundAgentManager, register/finish/list). Violation: register inserts, finish marks atomic flag, but nothing removes entries. remove() exists but is never called by the runtime — only potentially by test code. A long-running session that spawns 10 agents per hour over 8 hours leaks 80 finished BackgroundAgent Arcs, each holding a full output string and task description. list() scans them all on every agent_output listing. Mandated Refactor: (a) On finish, mark with a completion Instant; on register, sweep entries older than a TTL. (b) Separately, cap the manager at a max concurrent + max retained; oldest finished first to evict. (c) Provide a cleanup_finished() public API that tui.rs can call on session shutdown.
